pi_items.source: Task description line: 'Create a report file at `/home/ga/system_audit_report.txt`' and export_result.sh configuration
Task description specifies all 8 fields in required format. Export script (export_result.sh) and verifier (verifier.py) both expect these identical field names

privileged_info_summary: The task environment is completely synthetic, created by setup scripts in /workspace/scripts/. The Emoncms system runs in Docker containers (MariaDB 10.11, Redis 7.0-alpine, OpenEnergyMonitor Emoncms latest). The metadata correctly specifies a required output filename (/home/ga/system_audit_report.txt) and lists 8 fields that must be populated from the Emoncms admin panel display. The environment includes 6 pre-created feeds and 5 inputs, with MQTT explicitly disabled. All metadata structural claims are verified as accurate and consistent with the task implementation.
